CONTENT.Career: Lama started his career with Spanish La Liga side Atlético Madrid. In 2020, he was sent on loan to La Nucía in the Spanish third tier. On 27 January 2023, Lama moved to Fuenlabrada for 2.5 years, until June 2025.
CONTENT.Personal life: Lama is the son of Spanish sportscaster Manolo Lama.
CONTENT.External links: Manu Lama at BDFutbolManu Lama at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Manuel Lama Maroto (born 12 February 2001) is a Spanish footballer who plays as a defender for Fuenlabrada.
